title: The Hague, ZH — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

The Hague is a city in ZH with a population of 566,221. The seat of Dutch government and international law, offering a refined coastal lifestyle with a high concentration of expats and diplomats.
